evals.name: whole-flow-starts-with-gap-analysis
evals.prompt: เอา design ใน docs/design มาทำเป็น frontend ของแอปให้หน่อย
evals.expected_output: Should NOT start blindly building. Reads design docs by precedence + as-is code, produces a written as-is↔to-be gap report (token drift via token_diff, reuse/migrate/build-fresh per item, 18-screen status, data/service deltas) plus a phased plan, and STOPS for review before writing production code.

evals.name: single-screen-consent-correct-precedence
evals.prompt: ช่วย build หน้า consent ตาม design ให้หน่อย
evals.expected_output: Reads screens_detail.md Screen 1 (consent): builds CONTENT order, maps the GATING boolean (CTA enabled ⇔ checkbox checked) to disabled logic, ON ENTER (checkbox unchecked→CTA disabled), EXIT (next→nationality), and EDGE CASE (back keeps checkbox state). Reuses the existing QUESTIONS/store/form primitives rather than a parallel state system; uses tokens not raw hex.

evals.name: token-reconciliation-phase1
evals.prompt: tokens ใน docs/design กับ app/globals.css มันไม่ตรงกัน ช่วย reconcile ให้เป็นแหล่งเดียวที
evals.expected_output: Runs token_diff.py (or equivalent), identifies the real drift (logo-primary-color vs logo-primary, #06C755 vs #06c755, missing .dark theme), proposes reconciliation into app/globals.css as the single source WITHOUT breaking existing utilities, flags any rename that ripples, and treats this as the Phase 1 design-system step.
